title: Gantt chart for projects with no timelines
excerpt: I am trying to setup a dashboard and a Gantt chart. I would like to list all the projects along with the projects without a timeline on the Gantt chart. Is that possible? If not, any workarounds?

posts.author: ashwin.rajaratnam (Ashwin)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to setup a dashboard and a Gantt chart. I would like to list all the projects along with the projects without a timeline on the Gantt chart. Is that possible? If not, any workarounds?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ashwin.rajaratnam - the idea behind Gantt or Timeline widgets is to show the dates and connectivity between various items on the board.

What goal are you trying to accomplish with this view?

If you really wanted to have items in a Gantt view with no dates, you could just create a dummy date column (hidden) that has default values for every item created?

Outside of that perhaps looking into a different view like Kanban or alike?

Hope this helps,
Mark
